bird.name: Belding's yellowthroat
bird.summary: Belding's yellowthroat (Geothlypis beldingi) is a New World warbler. It is a resident breeder endemic to the southern Baja California Penin…

relations.subject: Belding's yellowthroat
relations.evidence: The breeding habitat is freshwater marshes and lagoons, usually with cattails
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Belding's yellowthroat
relations.evidence: This race has been drastically affected by habitat loss, and is now restricted to several small marshes in southernmost Baja California [the estero at San Jose del Cabo and the lagoon at Todo Santos; August, 2007]
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
